blocks.text: Chess Sunday: Carlsen plays, the Candidates clash
♟️ 16:15 — Magnus Carlsen, Grenke Chess Festival Round 7
Barcelona's late winner at Atlético yesterday opened a 7-point La Liga gap on Real Madrid, who also stumbled against Mallorca. The title race is shifting — and Champions League week arrives Tuesday.

blocks.label: ⚽ QF First Legs — Tue & Wed
items: Tue 21:00 — Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid
